name: 100% Cotton Embroidered One-Shoulder Dress
description:
name: 100% Cotton Embroidered One-Shoulder Dress, brand/slogan: Shide, description:Why We Made This Bold, elegant, and designed for ease. The one-shoulder silhouette brings a touch of drama, while the fully smocked bodice gently hugs curves, offering stretch and shape without constriction. The fit-and-flare cut adds balance and movement, and the embroidered hem draws the eye downward, subtly lengthening the figure. Crafted in breathable cotton, this dress keeps you cool and confident through sunny days and laid-back afternoons., detailedDescription:

Why We Made This

Bold, elegant, and designed for ease. The one-shoulder silhouette brings a touch of drama, while the fully smocked bodice gently hugs curves, offering stretch and shape without constriction. The fit-and-flare cut adds balance and movement, and the embroidered hem draws the eye downward, subtly lengthening the figure. Crafted in breathable cotton, this dress keeps you cool and confident through sunny days and laid-back afternoons.

description:

Designed with a relaxed drop shoulder and puffed sleeves, it creates a soft, romantic shape that doesn't overwhelm. The embroidery and lace accents bring artistry to everyday wear, while the straight silhouette keeps it grounded and easy to style. An elevated essential for the woman who values comfort with character., detailedDescription:

Why We Made This

This piece celebrates detail. Designed with a relaxed drop shoulder and puffed sleeves, it creates a soft, romantic shape that doesn't overwhelm. The embroidery and lace accents bring artistry to everyday wear, while the straight silhouette keeps it grounded and easy to style. An elevated essential for the woman who values comfort with character.
